videos.headline: Cam Rising picked off as Arizona State pulls off stunning upset
videos.description: Cam Rising throws it into the hands of Arizona State defender Caleb McCullough with just under two minutes remaining.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Rising picked off as Arizona State pulls off stunning upset) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Leavitt connects with Jordyn Tyson on 26-yard TD pass
videos.description: Arizona State QB Sam Leavitt heaves a perfect pass to Jordyn Tyson who runs it in for the 26-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt airs it out for 26-yard touchdown pass) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeff Sims wraps around for ASU TD
videos.description: Jeff Sims wraps around the line for an Arizona State touchdown, giving ASU a 13-6 lead over Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeff Sims wraps around for ASU TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Micah Bernard charges into end zone for Utes TD
videos.description: Micah Bernard powers into the end zone, pushing Utah ahead 15-13 over Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Micah Bernard charges into end zone for Utes TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo runs 47 yds for ASU TD
videos.description: Cam Skattebo runs 47 yds for ASU TD

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo runs 47 yds for ASU TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kenny Dillingham celebrates with students on field after upset
videos.description: Kenny Dillingham lauds his team's ability to stop the run and fight in an upset over No. 16 Utah at home.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kenny Dillingham celebrates with students on field after upset) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
